title: ImprovementReview
description: A review decision recorded for an improvement proposal, capturing the reviewer's verdict and supporting context.

proposal_id.description: Identifier of the proposal this review applies to.

review_id.description: Unique identifier for this review record.

reviewer.description: Identifier of the reviewer (human or agent) that issued this decision.

version.description: Schema version of this review document.

requires_manual_review.description: Whether this review must be performed by a human rather than an agent.

blocking_reasons.description: Optional list of reasons that are blocking approval or causing deferral.

approved_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the proposal was approved, if applicable.

rejected_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the proposal was rejected, if applicable.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes from the reviewer.
